bugs.error_message: openwolf scan indexed 515 files but the canonical apps/ tree was absent from anatomy.md; only stale .worktrees/ copies were indexed
bugs.root_cause: 12 stale git worktrees under .worktrees/ are gitignored but NOT in OpenWolf's exclude_patterns (OpenWolf scans by its own exclude list, not .gitignore). The 12 worktrees (~480 files) exhausted the max_files:500 budget before the walker reached apps/ (alphabetically after .worktrees), so the real source tree was never indexed.
bugs.fix: Added ".worktrees" to openwolf.anatomy.exclude_patterns in .wolf/config.json, then re-scanned. Result: 118 files, canonical apps/ tree indexed (probe.rs/profile.rs/install_config.rs present), 0 worktree refs, 0 out-of-scope refs.
